title: Amtech - Folding Hand Truck on Wheels for Moving Heavy Loads, Includes Cords to Secure Items, Durable, Lightweight, Collapsible for Easy Transport in Car Boot (25kg Capacity)
features: LIGHTWEIGHT AND DURABLE: This lightweight, folding sack truck is made from durable aluminium and steel, with sturdy wheels, and has a maximum weight capacity of 25kg
FOLDABLE AND COMPACT: It has a foldable, compact, telescopic design for easy storage and transportation
EASY TO USE: With a rounded, soft grip handle and a toe plate and wheels that open and close simultaneously, it is easy to handle and manoeuvre
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description The folding truck is made from aluminium and steel with sturdy wheels. It’s got a maximum weight capacity of 25kg. The foldable, compact, and telescopic design allows for easy storage and transportation. Designed with a rounded, soft-grip handle, toe plate, and wheels. The cords also help to secure your items when moving.
